description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'CTest (BVTs)' that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents and use a matrix strategy to build on Windows 2019 and 2022 with x64-Release configuration. Clone the repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure CMake, build, and run BVTs with CTest.
